faq.q: How many people work at AST & Science's India GCCs?

faq.q: Who leads AST & Science's GCC in India?
faq.a: Bamboo Reports tracks 2 leaders at AST & Science's India centers, across IT and GCC leadership. Names and contact details open with a free account.
